case_title: QIANG ZHONG WU VS. HIN LEUNG LAU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, QIANG ZHONG

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED AFTER COURT DISMISSAL [REMARKS:THE DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU CAME INTO CITY HALL AND WAS SERVED BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE.] SERVED DEC-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, MUN SUN
ORDER TO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WU, QIANG ZHONG

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF QIANG ZHONG WU IS NOT PRESENT, REQUESTED COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN IS PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HIN LEUNG LAU. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MUN SUN LAU ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WU, QIANG ZHONG AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, HIN LEUNG LAU, MUN SUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED AFTER COURT DISMISSAL [REMARKS:THE DEFENDANT'S FATHER MUN SUN LAU CAME INTO CITY HALL AND WAS SUB-SERVED BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE.] SERVED DEC-16-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, HIN LEUNG
